caseId.description: ONLY the Case ID (Salesforce 15 or 18 character ID). Extract from 'Case ID: [value]' or 'Case: [value]' or 'ID: [value]' patterns. Example: if input is 'Update case 500xx000000ABCD to closed', extract '500xx000000ABCD' only. Case IDs start with '500'. This field is REQUIRED.

status.description: ONLY the new status value. Extract from 'Status: [value]' or 'to [value]' or 'mark as [value]' patterns. Example: if input is 'Update case status to In Progress', extract 'In Progress' only. Valid values: 'New', 'Working', 'In Progress', 'Escalated', 'On Hold', 'Closed', 'Closed - Resolved', 'Closed - Not Resolved'. This field is REQUIRED.

resolutionNotes.description: ONLY the resolution notes or comments. Extract from 'Resolution: [value]' or 'Notes: [value]' or 'Comment: [value]' patterns. Example: if input is 'Close case with resolution: Fixed network configuration issue', extract 'Fixed network configuration issue' only. This field is OPTIONAL and typically used when closing a case.
